detectors.name: sqli
detectors.description: Tests query parameters, forms, and API-like inputs for error-based, boolean-based, and time-delay SQL injection signals.

detectors.name: xss
detectors.description: Checks reflected, DOM-rendered, and persistence-oriented XSS indicators across common input surfaces.

detectors.name: csrf
detectors.description: Flags state-changing forms and endpoints that appear to lack anti-CSRF protections.

detectors.name: auth_bypass
detectors.description: Looks for privileged or admin-style resources that are reachable without expected access controls.

detectors.name: advanced_surface
detectors.description: Safely flags GraphQL, OpenAPI, admin, upload, auth, and WebSocket surfaces for advanced validation workflows.

detectors.name: advanced_injection
detectors.description: Heuristically identifies NoSQL, command, LDAP, XPath, SSTI, XXE, and deserialization validation candidates.

detectors.name: advanced_client
detectors.description: Flags DOM XSS, stored/blind XSS, prototype pollution, and DOM clobbering candidate surfaces.

detectors.name: advanced_auth
detectors.description: Flags JWT, OAuth/OIDC, MFA/session, IDOR, BOLA, and RBAC bypass validation candidates.

detectors.name: advanced_server
detectors.description: Flags SSRF, file upload, traversal, cache poisoning, host header, WebSocket, race, and request smuggling candidates.
